metadata.description: The Continuous Mix Machine - a Mixcloud discovery concierge for long, no-talk DJ mixes.

plugins.name: mixcloud-mix-miner
plugins.description: Describe a vibe or name artists you like; get long continuous no-talk DJ mixes as playable links. Scores re-edits and contradictory-genre tags, mines the favorites network, builds Mixcloud playlists (Sonos-ready), and bulk-manages favorites.
